subject: refactor(import): per-transaction review replaces group-based classification
body:
Replace group-based ImportStepClassify with per-transaction ImportStepReview.
Users now review and enrich each transaction individually — classification,
tags, and variability are set per-transaction, not per-group.

Wizard simplified from 3 steps (Upload → Classify → Confirm) to 2 steps
(Upload → Review). Embeddings kept for fuzzy pattern matching (cosine ≥ 0.75)
instead of group clustering. Recurring patterns detected at save time by
grouping transactions with same description.

Tags: import, refactor, ux, ml
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: import-flow
Semver: minor
